description: Closed-loop plan-review gate. PreToolUse on ExitPlanMode runs plan-unknowns-gate.py, a 3-stage state machine (each fails open): (1) a soft review-plan nudge, hard under CLAUDE_PLAN_REQUIRE_REVIEW=1; (2) a Codex (OpenAI CLI, read-only sandbox) unknowns audit that blocks until an '## Open Unknowns' section exists and tags bullets needing active go-find-out research with [investigate]; (3) a closed-loop investigation gate — when agentic unknowns are tagged it blocks until /investigate-plan has run (proven by a host .investigated-<slug> sentinel) or the user waives via /waive-investigation, failing open when the hermes container is down. PostToolUse runs plan-review-cleanup.py to clear the investigation sentinels after a successful exit. Opt out with CLAUDE_PLAN_UNKNOWNS_GATE=0.

hooks.statusMessage: Codex auditing plan for unresolved unknowns...
